name: 吐纳打坐
description: 盘膝静坐，吐纳天地灵气，温养经脉。耗费时间，补充灵气，并累积炼气境修为。
//en_us_description: Sit in meditation, breathing in the qi of heaven and earth to nourish the meridians. Takes time; restores qi and accumulates Qi Refining cultivation.
//: 玩家主动发起的修炼动作：可施放 spell，施法即打坐。完成后由 EOC 加灵气、给炼气境 spell 加经验。详见 doc/03_qi_system.md「吐纳打坐」。
//base_casting_time: 约 30 秒一轮打坐（moves）。〔待平衡〕/ ~30s per meditation round.

//: 一轮吐纳完成的结算：先给炼气境加经验，再更新层数显示变量、补充灵气并钳制到动态上限。注意：未学会的 spell u_spell_exp 返回 -1，必须用 max(0,...) 兜底，否则首次打坐从 -1 起算导致整条经验链少 1 点、升级要多打一次（即「时好时坏」的 off-by-one 根因）。set_spell_exp 对未知 spell（值≥0）会自动习得。〔数值待平衡〕/ Per-round meditation payoff. NOTE: u_spell_exp returns -1 for an unknown spell, so guard the base with max(0,...) — otherwise the first meditation starts from -1, shifting the whole exp curve down by 1 and requiring an extra round to level (the intermittent off-by-one bug). set_spell_exp auto-learns an unknown spell when the value is >= 0.

effect.u_message: 你吐纳一周天，灵气温养经脉。
effect.//en_us: You complete a cycle of breathing; qi nourishes your meridians.

then.u_message: 修为精进！炼气已至 <u_val:qi_refining_layer> 层。
then.//en_us: Breakthrough! Qi Refining has reached layer N.
